name: Cricket Blitz
title: Cricket Blitz | Weekly Arcade - IPL-Style Cricket Game
description: Play Cricket Blitz free online. Face 5 overs of intense IPL-style cricket batting. Time your shots, smash boundaries, and chase down massive targets.
keywords: cricket blitz, cricket game, IPL game, batting game, arcade cricket, browser game
tips: Time your bat swing to the ball's bounce point — early swings go to leg side, late swings to off side
During powerplay overs, play aggressive shots to maximize run rate while fielding restrictions are active
Choose to bat first on higher difficulty — defending totals is harder against smarter AI bowling
Watch the bowler's hand for swing direction cues before committing to your shot
Save your super over strategy for close matches — aggressive batting works best in super overs
howToPlay: Win the toss and choose to bat or bowl. When batting, time your tap to swing the bat and score runs. When bowling, aim your delivery and choose pace or spin. Complete 5 overs per innings. The team with more runs wins. Super over decides ties.
aboutGame: Cricket Blitz is a 3D IPL-style cricket game with full match mechanics including batting, bowling, toss, powerplay, and super over. Built with Canvas 2D rendering, it delivers an authentic cricket experience in your browser. Features touch-optimized controls for mobile play and AI opponents that adapt to your batting style.

faq.a: Yes. Cricket Blitz is 100% free on Weekly Arcade - no ads, no in-app purchases, no downloads. Play full cricket matches instantly in your browser.

faq.q: Does Cricket Blitz have real IPL teams?
faq.a: Cricket Blitz features IPL-style gameplay with batting, bowling, powerplay, and super over mechanics, but uses original team names rather than licensed IPL franchises.

faq.q: Can I bowl in Cricket Blitz?
faq.a: Yes. After the toss, you can choose to bat or bowl first. When bowling, select from 6 delivery types (straight, inswing, outswing, bouncer, yorker, slower) and aim your delivery.
